0: A humble pebble. Found near beaches. Has aspirations.
1: A mysterious egg. Nobody knows what hatches. Probably another blob.
2: A wriggly little tadpole, fresh from the egg. Wiggle wiggle.
3: A frog! Says ribbit. Lives in the jar. Tolerated by all.
4: A cat. Judges your every drop. Demands snacks. Probably plotting.
5: A dog. Wholesome 100. Loyal forever. Will fetch your dignity if you lose it.
6: A capybara. The chillest creature in the Blobverse. Vibes immaculate.
7: A bear. Needs a hug. Will give you one if you ask nicely. Or take one.
8: An elephant. Never forgets. Has filed your last bad drop in a folder.
9: A whale. Majestic and a bit chonky. Spouts greetings. Sings sometimes.
10: A PLANET. You did it. You broke physics. The universe applauds you. Wear sunscreen.
